title: Scope-Drift Protected Paths
description: Always-protected paths checked by .claude/scripts/shared/scope-drift-check.js. Touching one of these paths during a /work sub-issue requires the issue body to name it explicitly (or a Scope-Override: line). Schema-driven so CI catches drift between the file and the consumer.

version.description: Schema version of this metadata file. Bump on breaking shape changes.

pattern.description: Glob pattern (minimatch syntax) matched against repo-relative paths. Use '**' for recursive directories.

reason.description: Why this path is protected. Surfaced to the user when the gate halts.
